creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
Created attachment 245955
update patch

mail/roundcube-larry is set of css, images and html. It does not contains any php code. So I think that IGNOGE_WITH_PHP should be removed - mail/roundcube should have this knob.

I've made a very simple patch which removes ignore_with_php.

And I did not tested it with poudriere - patch does not "touch" any package files.
